friction_detail: Session hit context compaction, which means some earlier history was summarized away. User messages contained explicit frustration, which usually points to trust or convergence issues. Session ran from a workspace-path variant, which increases thread fragmentation risk.
brief_summary: [REVIEW] ORCH 1- Clean worktree dirty paths. The broad inventory hit too many status checks at once, so I’m trimming it down to the structural facts only: linked worktrees versus standalone repos versus loose non-Git directories. That’s enough to decide the next internal re-or...
